texts.name: advertisement_consent_screen_text
texts.devText: As described in Section 2.2 of the General Terms of Use  of the \"My Driving Style\" app and in Section 6 of our data protection notes, we would like to inform you about offers for selected services and products from us, our partners and other third parties (e.g. cooperation partners and companies from the following industries: banking, leasing, Insurance and Mobility).\n\nBy deactivating Marketing, you object to the future display of direct marketing in the \"My Driving Style\" app. If you would like to receive offers for selected services and products from us, our partners, and other third parties (see section 6 of the data protection notes) that are customized for you, you can change this setting at any time

texts.name: app_error_description
texts.devText: The app received a critical error. To continue using it, please open the settings and clear the app storage.

texts.name: app_update_additional_info
texts.devText: If the update isn\'t available yet, please try again later.

texts.name: app_update_mandatory_text
texts.devText: To continue using the My Driving Style app, please install the latest version from the Store.

texts.name: app_update_text
texts.devText: A new version of the My Driving Style app is now available in the store. You\'re welcome to continue using the current version, but we recommend updating to the latest version for the best experience and improved security.

texts.name: app_update_title
texts.devText: A new software version is available.

texts.name: challenge_braking_bad_habits_description
texts.devText: No hard braking until two consecutive trips of at least 15 minutes each have been completed

texts.name: challenge_break_it_down_description
texts.devText: Avoid hard braking in one trip of at least 20 minutes.

texts.name: challenge_comfortable_joe_description
texts.devText: Drive without hard braking or hard acceleration for 45 minutes

texts.name: challenge_consistency_king_description
texts.devText: Score above 90 for the past 10 trips of at least 10 minutes.

texts.name: challenge_gentle_glide_description
texts.devText: Complete a 30-minute trip with no severe events

texts.name: challenge_good_effort_description
texts.devText: Complete 40 consecutive trips with a score above 80 regardless of the trip duration.

texts.name: challenge_rock_steady_description
texts.devText: Drive without any harsh cornering events for 60 minutes

texts.name: consent_download_popup_content
texts.devText: Scan the QR code on the right with your phone to download the terms of use.

texts.name: consent_notification_message
texts.devText: Please open the app to keep using it.

texts.name: consent_screen_error_message_first
texts.devText: A network error occurred. Please try again.

texts.name: consent_screen_error_message_second
texts.devText: A network error occurred. Error code: %1$s.\nIf the problem continues, please contact customer support and provide this code.

texts.name: consent_screen_new_version_mandatory_title
texts.devText: Action required: Terms of use update

texts.name: initial_consent_first_paragraph
texts.devText: I hereby accept the aforementioned terms of use for using the My Driving Style app

texts.name: initial_consent_second_paragraph
texts.devText: I am aware that my right to withdraw expires when the contracted partner begins executing the contract.

texts.name: initial_consent_title
texts.devText: Consent provided for using the app

texts.name: locationPermissionScreen_explanation
texts.devText:
The My Driving Style app requires access to your vehicle's GPS data to accurately analyse your driving behaviour and to provide key features such as challenges, driver analytics and other gamification elements. This data is essential for ensuring the app functions as intended. Without location permission, these features cannot be enabled and the app will not be usable.

To proceed, please grant permission by following the path:

Open settings > Permissions > Location > Allow all the time

texts.name: notificationPermissionScreen_explanation
texts.devText:
The My Driving Style app requires access to notifications in order to keep you informed about important updates, relevant changes and exclusive offers. Enabling notifications ensures that the My Driving Style app works as intended and that you don’t miss out on key information related to your driving analytics and app features. Without this permission, you may not receive essential alerts.

To proceed, please grant permission by following the path:

Grant permission > Allow

texts.name: notificationPermissionScreen_explanation2
texts.devText:
The My Driving Style app requires access to notifications in order to keep you informed about important updates, relevant changes and exclusive offers. Enabling notifications ensures that the My Driving Style app works as intended and that you don’t miss out on key information related to your driving analytics and app features. Without this permission, you may not receive essential alerts.

To proceed, please grant permission by following the path:

Open settings > Activate notification toggle

texts.name: offer_message
texts.devText: Have you heard about Audi insurance? Scan the QR code and learn more online, or get more information by phone. Service hotline:\n%1$s\n%2$s

texts.name: personalized_offer_message
texts.devText: This insurance might be of interest.

texts.name: privacy_policy_popup_content
texts.devText: Scan the QR code on the right with your phone to download the data protection notes.

texts.name: rank_attentive_chauffeur_description
texts.devText: The Attentive Chauffeur is a diligent and safety-conscious driver. Their commitment to safety makes them a reliable choice for any trip.

texts.name: rank_casual_driver_description
texts.devText: The Casual Driver is a laid-back traveller, enjoying the journey while focusing on getting to the destination in a timely manner.

texts.name: rank_comfortable_navigator_description
texts.devText: A Comfortable Navigator is a driver who ensures passengers are at ease throughout the ride.

texts.name: rank_cool_cruiser_description
texts.devText: Cool Cruisers bring a sense of style to the road. They handle their vehicle with grace and finesse, making driving look effortless.

texts.name: rank_green_roller_description
texts.devText: The Green Roller is a driver with a gentle touch on the wheel, skillfully navigating the road with a focus on precision and safety.

texts.name: rank_not_available_while_driving
texts.devText: For your safety, limited operation while driving.

texts.name: rank_road_champion_description
texts.devText: The Road Champion is the pinnacle of driving excellence. They conquer the road with unwavering skill and precision.

texts.name: rank_smooth_operator_description
texts.devText: A Smooth Operator is the master of a fluid and seamless driving experience, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride for all.

texts.name: revoke_consent_popup_content
texts.devText: Revoking your consent will disable the functionality of the My Driving Style app, including the collection and analysis of your driving data. Are you sure you want to proceed with revoking your consent\?

texts.name: score_service_notification_content
texts.devText: The My Driving Style app is currently active.

texts.name: settings_open_source_disclaimer_not_available_while_driving
texts.devText: For your safety, limited operation while driving.

texts.name: text_blocking
texts.devText: For your safety, limited operation while driving.

texts.name: trip_viz_info
texts.devText: The displayed GPS track is an abstract visualisation of your trip, based on your driving behaviour, coordinates, and the time. It shows the course of your trip and when the event occurred based on the time and distance driven.

texts.name: trips_screen_empty_trip_list
texts.devText: We are currently completing the necessary setup for you in the background.\nThis process may take some time and may involve multiple trips.\nWe appreciate your patience.

texts.name: you_had_a_perfect_trip
texts.devText: Great job! You had a perfect trip and didn\'t trigger any events. Keep it up!
